title: Gluten-Free Pickle Crumble
description: A tangy and crunchy gluten-free dessert made with pickles and a crumbly crust.
instructions: Mix together the almond flour, sugar, and crumbly in a bowl.
Add the melted butter and mix until crumbly.
Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch (23cm) square baking dish.
While the crust is baking, mix together the chopped pickles and eggs in a separate bowl.
Once the crust is ready, pour the pickle mixture on top.
Return the baking dish to the oven and bake for an additional 25-30 minutes, or until the filling is set.
Remove the baking dish from the oven and let it cool completely.
Once cooled, refrigerate the dessert for at least 30 minutes before serving.
